_source: UK SIC 2007 — UK Standard Industrial Classification of Economic Activities, Office for National Statistics
_status: DRAFT — not wired into build_supplier_profiles.py yet. Incorporate when team agrees.
_coverage: Common codes for UK government supplier base (extends the 40-code embedded map in build_supplier_profiles.py to ~300 codes covering >98% of suppliers in our dataset).

_section_index.Q: Human health and social work activities (86100-88990)
